title: QuantiNova SYBR Green qPCR
description: QIAGEN SYBR Green fast 20 uL qPCR: 2 min 95 C activation, ultrafast 2-step cycling, melt-curve analysis.

ingredients.name: QuantiNova SYBR Green PCR Master Mix
ROX Reference Dye (Applied Biosystems cyclers only)

payload.notes: SYBR Green chemistry; QIAGEN strongly recommends running the melt-curve analysis to verify product specificity (use your cycler's built-in melt program, which typically ramps to ~95 C; QIAGEN does not publish numeric melt ramp settings). Fast 2-step protocol: primers 0.7 uM each final; amplicon 60-200 bp (use a 30 sec combined annealing/extension for amplicons over 200 bp). 35-40 cycles depending on template amount. ROX Reference Dye is added only on Applied Biosystems cyclers (2 uL of a 1:10 dilution for high-ROX instruments, or 0.1 uL of a 1:200 dilution for low-ROX); no ROX on Rotor-Gene, Bio-Rad CFX, or Roche LightCycler. For 384-well plates use a 10 uL reaction (halve all volumes). Source: QIAGEN QuantiNova SYBR Green PCR Kit Handbook (04/2024), https://www.qiagen.com/us/resources/download/KitHandbook/quantinova-sybr-green-pcr-handbook
